title: Machan Meesai Lyrics Dhill
stanzas:
Machan meesai veecharuvaa
machini ellaam yengiduvaa
machan kannu mandhirama
suthi ponen pambarama

seikooli sethaaram
ellaam adhu illama
bramman thaan senju
vachaaru ada ellaame

railu naan chikku
bukku railu
nee modha vandhaa
mailu naan enna aaveno

mayilu naan
marudha mala mayilu
nee machili pattnam
puyalu naan
aadippoveno..

Sela oru mundhi vacha
sela oru muthu mani
maala nee vaangi
thaariyaa.

aala oru sengarumbu aala
oru malliga poonjola
adha ezhuthi thariyaa

kizhakkaala maerkkaala
nellu velanja oru kolla
thangavala thaevayila
vairathodu paravaala

ye kapadi kapadi
naan aadi paarkka ready
naan sonnadhu
vaangithaa.

Machan meesai veecharuvaa
machini ellaam yengiduvaa
machan kannu mandhirama
suthi ponen pambarama

seikooli sethaaram
ellaam adhu illama

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Machan Meesai'?

'Machan Meesai' is a lively song that celebrates friendship and fun, with playful lyrics that evoke a sense of joy and camaraderie.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Dhill?

The song is featured in a celebratory scene in Dhill, highlighting the carefree and joyous moments shared by the characters.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Machan Meesai'?

The song is sung by Pushpa Anand and composed by Vidyasagar, known for his catchy and vibrant music style.

When was 'Machan Meesai' released?

'Machan Meesai' was released on July 13, 2001, as part of the movie Dhill.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Dhill, 'Machan Meesai' serves as a lively anthem that embodies the spirit of friendship and celebration. The upbeat tempo and energetic vocals create an atmosphere of joy, making it perfect for festive occasions. The playful lyrics by Pa Vijay add a humorous touch, reflecting the carefree nature of the characters. Overall, the song evokes feelings of happiness and camaraderie, making it a favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Machan Meesai from Dhill is a vibrant dance number that showcases the energetic vocals of Pushpa Anand, complemented by Vidyasagar's catchy music. This song perfectly captures the lively spirit of celebration and is sure to get everyone on their feet. With its playful lyrics by Pa Vijay, it's a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Hey, what are you thinking about, my friend? Where is everything going? I looked around and saw the beautiful things.
Everything is fine, without it, the Brahmin just said that everything is fine.
Don't hide, don't laugh, don't hold back your hands.
If I come by train, you will come by train too, what will happen to me?
If I am a peacock, you are a fish, will I dance in the city?
You are the fire, you are the water, will you come together?
Like honey, like me, come searching, come, come.
Because of you, my heart is filled with something, what is it, what is it?
That's it, that's it, it's for you, now it's for you.
Hey, what are you thinking about, my friend? Where is everything going?
If you put a little bit of a flower, will you bring a pearl necklace?
If a person is a rose, if a person is a jasmine, will you write it down?
In the east or the west, if the paddy is ripe, a golden girl is needed, but don't worry about it.
What is this, I am ready to dance, I said I will take it.
That's it, that's it, it's for you, now it's for you.
Hey, what are you thinking about, my friend? Where is everything going? I looked around and saw the beautiful things.
Everything is fine, without it, the Brahmin just said that everything is fine.
Don't hide, don't laugh, don't hold back your hands.
